sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4505" key="a)llotriopragi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοτριο-πρᾱγία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n4505.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">meddling with other folk's business</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.57d</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in R.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.216K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
